prompt: To Whom It May Concern: Our organization subscribed to your enterprise tier on January 3rd. The API access promised in the contract has not been provisioned as of February 22nd — seven weeks overdue. We require a formal written explanation and a binding remediation timeline by end of week.
reference_response:
Dear Sir or Madam,

We acknowledge your complaint regarding the delayed API provisioning under your enterprise subscription initiated January 3rd. We recognize this delay is unacceptable and constitutes a failure to meet our contractual obligations.

Following an internal review, API access will be fully provisioned by February 26th. A formal written explanation and remediation report will be delivered to you by February 24th.

We remain committed to fulfilling our obligations and regret the disruption caused.

Yours sincerely,
Enterprise Support Division
